Hero.Description: I focus on building secure, scalable backends and highly interactive frontends. My core stack involves React, Node.js, Python, and PostgreSQL.

Services.Title: What I
Services.Description: I provide a wide range of digital services to help your business grow and stand out in the competitive landscape.

Items.FrontendDesc: Building beautiful, responsive, and highly interactive user interfaces.
Items.BackendDesc: Creating robust APIs and server-side architecture.
Items.ResponsiveDesc: Ensuring applications work perfectly across all devices.
Items.CleanCodeDesc: Writing maintainable and documented code following best practices.
